ideals: I addressed challenges with poise, passion, or social status
I challenged or acted against my heritage, background, or standing beliefs with my actions
I learned something new about my companions
system.secondWind: You may regain all effort when someone else relieves all effort.

specialAbility.name: Special Ability
specialAbility.effect: When you're exhausted, characters that aid you spend no effort.

powers.name: Rarefied
powers.description: You have a knack for actions involving highborn or high class people. However, using this knack makes all actions involving low class people 0d at best until end of session.

powers.name: Private Tutor
powers.description: Choose any action to re-roll any 1s on. Choose one other action where you must re-roll any 6s.

powers.name: Silver Spoon
powers.description: You can never be accused of trespassing except by high rank people. Get +1d to cover for companions.

powers.name: Trust the Fund
powers.description: You always have enough money to sway someone for access, assets, or information. Gain +1d or increased effect, but it's incredibly obvious you're bribing them.

powers.name: Special Reserve
powers.description: Get +1d or increased effect when gathering information about something rare, expensive, or hard to find.

powers.name: Ivory Tower
powers.description: 2/session - When the GM describes a location, monster, person, or event, ask for an additional detail only an expert would know. Get +1d the next time you act on the answer.

powers.name: Honor Student
powers.description: If you forgo healing burdens, tick an extra segment on an ambition. If you bring another character to observe, they can also tick a segment.

powers.name: Passionate
powers.description: You always have a secret passion ambition - a 12 segment clock that gives 3 xp. Can be worked on for free each interlude.

powers.name: Unflappable
powers.description: Leading actions to Command or Charm a large group costs no effort for you.

powers.name: Perfect Grace
powers.description: 1/session - Increase the effect of your next Charm action to superpowered.

powers.name: Gambit of the Bronze Queen
powers.description: Take a power from another Bond.

gearKits.name: Noble's Kit
items: Two changes of fancy clothes, dueling weapon, personal reference, traveling trunk, expensive jewelry, knowledge of city politics, noble pedigree

gearKits.name: Academic Kit
items: Thick-bound almanac, late night snacks, extensive notes, hobby journal, sample kit, extra large pack, expensive arkentech contraption

gearKits.name: Cloister Kit
items: Simple ritual gear, protective ward, traveling staff, good hat, badge of a scholarly or religious order, old arkentech relic of unknown use
